name: Sydney Murphy

contactInfo.office: 101 W. Church St., Suite 300, Livingston, TX 77351

bio: Sydney Murphy serves as the Polk County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Polk County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Livingston area.
campaignPromises: Keep Polk County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
